title: claytonia parviflora var. adsurgens
intro: Claytonia parviflora var. adsurgens, also known as the mountain spring beauty or western springbeauty, is a rare and unique plant species that belongs to the portulacaceae family. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Claytonia parviflora var. adsurgens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile addition to herbal remedies.
